value.rationale: The fetched page describes the Codex SDK (TypeScript and Python libraries for programmatically controlling local Codex agents), sandbox presets (read_only, workspace_write, full_access), and thread/run concepts. There is no mention anywhere on the page of a "dev container" integration or running the agent inside a defined dev container or isolated dev-container runtime. The sandbox presets described are filesystem-level access controls, not dev container definitions. The claim is not substantiated by the page.
